subject: GBM Trigger 150813665 is not a GRB
body:
P. Jenke (UAH) reports on behalf of the Fermi GBM Team:

"The Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor (GBM) trigger bn150813665 at
15:57:41.15 UT on 13 August 2015, tentatively classified as a GRB, is in
fact not due to a GRB. This trigger is likely due to a soft gamma repeater event."
